Wikidata Geographic Dumps

Pre-filtered geographic extracts from the Wikidata JSON dump. Each dump contains Wikidata entities that have a coordinate location (P625) and represent currently existing features.

Available dumps

Browse available dump dates →

File formats

  • .geojsonl — GeoJSONSeq (RFC 8142, newline-delimited GeoJSON Features)
  • .fgb — FlatGeobuf
  • .parquet — GeoParquet
  • .ndjson — intermediate wikibase-dump-filter NDJSON

Source

Pipeline source: gitlab.wikimedia.org/toolforge-repos/wikidata-geo-dumps
